import hashlib
from dataclasses import dataclass, field
from typing import List, Optional


@dataclass
class ModelConfig:
    model_name: str
    region: str = "us-east-1"
    tags: List[str] = field(default_factory=list)
    checksum: Optional[str] = None


class ModelLoader:
    def __init__(self, s3_client):
        self._s3_client = s3_client

    def load(self, config: ModelConfig) -> bytes:
        artifact = self._s3_client.get_object(
            Bucket="models-bucket", Key=f"{config.model_name}/artifact.bin"
        )["Body"].read()
        config.checksum = hashlib.sha256(artifact).hexdigest()
        return artifact
